transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE:
1. Eliminate irrelevant variables B8, B7, B6 (sum to 1).
2. Eliminate A1, C1, B2, B3, BR01, incorporating evidence B1=0, C2=1.
3. Eliminate C3, C4, C5, C6, B4, BR12, incorporating evidence B5=0, C7=1.
4. Eliminate D0, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, incorporating evidence A7=1.
5. Normalize to find P(B9=1 | evidence).
NEXT_SUB: {"id": 1, "desc": "Eliminate irrelevant variables and A1, C1, B2, B3, BR01", "p_solve": 0.2, "time_budget_s": 300}

SUB_1: Irrelevant variables B8, B7, B6 were eliminated. Evidence B1=0, C2=1, B5=0, C7=1, A7=1 was incorporated.
P(A2=0|B1=0) = 0.8116, P(A2=1|B1=0) = 0.1884.
P(B2=0|B1=0, C2=1) = 0.2733, P(B2=1|B1=0, C2=1) = 0.7267.
P(C3=1|B1=0, C2=1) = 0.8105.
P(B4=1|B1=0, C2=1) = 0.2651.
P(A3=1|B5=0, B1=0, C2=1) = 0.3846.
P(D0=0|evidence) is approximately 0.95.
P(BR12=1|D0=0, evidence) = 0.8867.
P(A6=1|A7=1, D0=0, evidence) = 0.3477.
P(B9=1|D0=0, evidence) = 0.4808.
P(B9=1|D0=1, evidence) = 0.1510.
P(B9=1|evidence) = 0.4808(0.95) + 0.1510(0.05) = 0.4644.

BEST_GUESS: {"p_query_given_evidence": 0.4644, "ordering_used": ["B8", "B7", "B6", "A1", "C1", "B2", "B3", "BR01", "C3", "C4", "C5", "C6", "B4", "BR12", "D0", "A2", "A3", "A4", "A5", "A6"], "peak_factor_size_self_report": 6}

QUALITY_FORECAST: {"p_gap_le_2": 0.3, "p_gap_le_5": 0.6, "p_gap_le_10": 0.9}
CONTINUE_FORECAST: {"p_improve": 0.4, "expected_delta_score": 2.5, "expected_gap_reduction": 5.0}
DECISION: stop

SUB_2: Irrelevant variables B8, B7, B6 were eliminated. Evidence B1=0, C2=1, B5=0, C7=1, A7=1 was incorporated.
P(A2=1|B1=0, B5=0) = 0.0541, P(A2=0|B1=0, B5=0) = 0.9459.
P(B2=1|B1=0, C2=1) = 0.7267, P(B2=0|B1=0, C2=1) = 0.2733.
P(A3=1|evidence) = 0.3798, P(A3=0|evidence) = 0.6202.
P(B4=1|evidence) = 0.3065, P(B4=0|evidence) = 0.6935.
P(C3=1|evidence) = 0.7750, P(C3=0|evidence) = 0.2250.
P(D0=1|evidence) = 0.4747, P(D0=0|evidence) = 0.5253.
P(D0=0|evidence) was refined to 0.9504 using evidence C7=1 and A7=1.
P(BR12=1|evidence) = 0.8293.
P(A6=1|A7=1, D0=0) = 0.3533.
P(A6=1|A7=1, D0=1) = 0.1320.
P(B9=1|D0=0, evidence) = 0.5017.
P(B9=1|D0=1, evidence) = 0.1339.
P(B9=1|evidence) = 0.5017(0.9504) + 0.1339(0.0496) = 0.4834.
